summary: Made two surgical seam edits: tightened the opening callback to Chapter 12's B41/lock-deadline handoff and specified the B44 in the final line to align the Chapter 14 entry transition.
edits: Opening continuity line now explicitly echoes the prior chapter's 'no clean plan' B41 arrival into Sunset Park.
Final timeline line now names the B44 route to Church Avenue before the ten o'clock Carina visit.
